chunks.text: Rising Stars 2020: Job Talk Starts Preparation - EECS at Berkeley Rising Stars 2020: Job Talk Starts Preparation Over the course of the two-day workshop, there will be 4 Job Talk Starts sessions, each with 7 or 8 Zoom rooms per session. There will be 4 to 5 presenters per room plus faculty mentors and support staff. During these sessions: You will present the first 7 minutes of your job talk In it, you should introduce yourself and provide an overview of your research contributions, goals, and long-term vision You can present slides along with your talk via desktop sharing on Zoom You will receive feedback from faculty mentors and participants for 5 minutes following your talk You can record your individual Job Talk Start presentation and feedback session yourself through Zoom (we will not be recording this for you) Staff will be present in the Job Talk Starts Zoom rooms to keep time and help facilitate the flow of presentations We recommend you familiarize yourself with the following Zoom features: screen sharing local recording Day 1 Group 1 – 1:00 to 2:00 pm Group 2 – 2:15 to 3:15 pm Day 2 Group 3 – 10:30 to 11:30 am Group 4 – 2:15 to 3:15 pm See the spreadsheet shared via email for your group and room assignments. < Rising Stars 2020: How To Prepare Rising Stars 2020: Mentoring Session Preparation > View Open Faculty Positions
